title: Umbrella Companies: tackling non-compliance in the umbrella company market
body: "This measure makes recruitment agencies accountable for PAYE on payments to workers supplied through umbrella companies.  If the labour supply chain has:   more than one agency, the rules apply to the agency that has the direct contract with the end client to supply the worker no agency, the rules apply to the end client   This measure will have effect from 6 April 2026. "
